reviews.comment:
Si llegas alrededor de las 7am prepárate para esperar 20 min mínimo. No se si te es cambio de turno o que pero atiende gralmente 1 o 2 personas a la velocidad de un perezoso.

(Translated by Google)
If you arrive around 7 am, be prepared to wait at least 20 minutes. I don't know if it's a shift change or what, but they usually serve only 1 or 2 people at a snail's pace.
